sys_script_fix.description:
2.6.400 When organizations change the parent for an OU and that OU has more than 2 levels below it, the level for the OU is not reset on the lower levels correctly. This fix script will the level for all OUs
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product
Release Introduced: 2.6.400 - Only needs to be run a single time - This can be run IF levels ever are out of sync to reset the levels across the entire organization
Purpose: - This script corrects any issues related to levels of an OU. - The script starts at the top of each Top OU and recurses down the Organziational tree and updates the level adding one each level it moves down
Validation: Each updated OU will be listed in the Log 'Fix Script - Reset OU level for OU (' + grOUs.office_name + ') From Level(' + fromLevel + ') To Level(' + grOUs.office_level + ')');
- Open the Organizational Hierarchy Table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Add the OU Level field "OU Level" to the list - Add the Parent field "Parent" to the list - RESULT: Each Parent child relationship in the tree should increment the OU Level by 1
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "OU Name:[ouName] - - Error in 'Tasker 2.6.400 Correct OU Levels' - exception: " + error
If any values are wrong, report the differences to the DTech Apps support team.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.6.400 Correct OU Levels
